mcq.question: What is the role of the ALU?
mcq.correct: To carry out arithmetic and logical operations
wrong: To connect devices to the internet

mcq.question: Which part of the CPU controls the fetch-decode-execute cycle?
Which of these is a logical operation?
mcq.correct: Comparing whether one value is greater than another

mcq.question: How do the control unit and ALU work together?
mcq.correct: The control unit directs operations and the ALU performs calculations and logic
wrong: The ALU stores programs and the control unit prints output
The control unit stores images and the ALU controls the keyboard
The ALU fetches data from the internet and the control unit saves it
